name: Synco Xtalk XPro9 Wireless Intercom System with 9 Single-Ear Headsets
description: The Synco Xtalk XPro9 is a full-duplex wireless intercom system designed to provide clear communication in a true-wireless form factor without requiring a bodypack or hub.

features.Key Features:: 9 Single-Ear Headset, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use Any Headset as Master | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | AI Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) 2.0 | Expandable to 13 Headsets | 1640' Transmission Distance | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Compatible with XTalk X & XMax | Rechargeable Batteries, Charging Station
